articles.title: GBP/JPY Price Forecast: Clears key resistance, aims towards 212.00
articles.snippet: The GBP/JPY rallies for the second straight day, up by over 0.80% as Yen weakness extends, as the Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi nominates two slightly “dovish” academics to the Bank of Japan’s board. The cross trades at 211.94, slightly below the day’s high of 212.12.

articles.title: United Airlines selects GE Aerospace (GE)’s GEnx Engines for Boeing 787
The Boeing Company’s (BA) 777-9 Flight Training Simulators Receives Qualification Certification

combined_text:
[0.50] GBP/JPY Price Forecast: Clears key resistance, aims towards 212.00
The GBP/JPY rallies for the second straight day, up by over 0.80% as Yen weakness extends, as the Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi nominates two slightly “dovish” academics to the Bank of Japan’s board. The cross trades at 211.94, slightly below the day’s high of 212.12.

[0.33] United Airlines selects GE Aerospace (GE)’s GEnx Engines for Boeing 787


[0.33] The Boeing Company’s (BA) 777-9 Flight Training Simulators Receives Qualification Certification
